resources.string: Monitor SMS notifications to prevent missed forwards. When enabled, it can capture system SMS notifications and forward them to email and Telegram.
Stable guardian, auto-retry, and background checks started.
Mail refresh failed, please try again later.
Cannot receive system SMS arrival broadcasts.
ContentObserver backup monitoring requires SMS read permission.
Enable at least one email or Telegram channel.
Doze or vendor background policies may cause missed forwards.
Once started, it will maintain ContentObserver and auto-retry.
Can supplement SMS notification monitoring to reduce missed messages.
Failures and retry results may not notify users.
Will auto-resend after network recovery, or manual retry available.
Recommend checking account configuration or network access.
Complete permissions and forward channels first.
Core forwarding available, but stability risks remain.
Listening chain ready, will auto-forward after receiving SMS.
Listening, guardian, and retry chain status good.
May be restricted, recommend stable optimization
Inbox check disabled, will not fetch mail commands.
Add trusted sender to parse commands.
System battery optimization may delay background mail checks.
Some mail commands were rejected by security policy.
Background low-frequency check ready, recommend manual refresh first.
Only trusted senders can trigger commands.
Whitelist, secret, expiration, and nonce validation enabled.
New secret generated, please copy and save.
Use foreground service and IMAP IDLE to wait for new mail, suitable for faster response scenarios.
High, will show foreground service notification
Real-time monitoring requires enabling and configuring inbox first.
Test login first, then refresh summary once. Refresh only reads mail headers; only trusted senders will have limited body parsed for commands.
Only grant actions this mailbox actually needs.

Mail commands must include key or HMAC signature, expires, and nonce. Expires recommended within 10 minutes, maximum 30 minutes. Examples use placeholders; secret is not written to notifications or execution logs.
Can control command permissions per mailbox individually.
Add the first mailbox that can send commands.
Generate copyable test command templates. Templates do not include saved secrets; replace placeholders with this test secret before sending.
HMAC smoke can calculate sig by action, expires, nonce in security confirmation page or external script; app will not read saved secret here.
Real-time monitoring failed to start, please check system background restrictions; low-frequency check will still run.
Please enable and configure inbox first.
Real-time monitoring disabled, low-frequency check will still run.
Mail refresh failed, please try again later.
Local command dry run failed, please try again later.
Trusted sender status update failed, please try again later.
Command secret refresh failed, please try again later.
Trusted sender deletion failed, please try again later.
Trusted sender deleted, secret copy entry cleared.
Mailbox configuration saved, real-time monitoring synced and enabled.
Mailbox configuration saved; real-time monitoring failed to start, low-frequency check will still run.
%s Real-time monitoring failed to start, low-frequency check will still run.
Mail command rule save failed, please try again later.
Mailbox connection test failed, please try again later.
Inbox test failed, please try again later.
Inbox settings save failed, please try again later.
Trusted sender save failed, please try again later.
Test login first, then refresh summary once. Refresh only reads mail headers; only trusted senders will have limited body parsed for commands.
Only grant actions this mailbox actually needs.

Mail commands must include key or HMAC signature, expires, and nonce. Expires recommended within 10 minutes, maximum 30 minutes. Examples use placeholders; secret is not written to notifications or execution logs.
No accounts yet, tap + to add
Paysage connects to your SMTP server from this device. No relay server is used.
Encrypt forwarded SMS with AES-GCM. Share this key only with the receiving mailbox owner.
Fill in SMTP server, sender account, credential, and recipient email.
AES key must be a 256-bit Base64 value.
AES key generated. Copy it for the receiver before sending encrypted mail.
Test send failed. Check SMTP settings, credential, and network.

Paysage encrypted SMS
Format: %1$s
IV: %2$s
Ciphertext: %3$s

Decrypt with the AES key saved for this recipient.
No filter rules yet, tap + to add
Select app theme and display mode
Can enable OLED pure black mode
Use pure black background in dark mode, save power and enhance OLED screen contrast
Forwarding accounts, delivery targets, and mail command inbox.
Configure Email and Telegram targets for message forwarding.
Receive whitelisted email commands and review command execution.
Download behavior, operation refresh, notifications, and diagnostics.
Select enable profile after download when submitting system download request.
Automatically re-read eUICC status after switch, delete, rename or download request submission.
Check compatibility when opening eSIM page
Automatically read device capabilities, system entry, eUICC summary and reader summary when entering eSIM page.
Display recent system eSIM operation results on eSIM page, history only includes non-sensitive result codes and times.
Show notification when system returns eSIM download result.
Show notification when system returns eSIM switch result.
Show notification when system returns eSIM delete result.
Show notification when system returns eSIM rename result.
Show OMAPI reader and allow manual SELECT ISD-R; recommended to keep off for regular users.
Diagnostic reports are always anonymized and do not include activation codes, confirmation codes, EID, ICCID, IMSI, phone numbers, full APDU responses or ATR raw text.
Cannot open system eSIM management page.
ATR read, length %d bytes; raw text not displayed.
Authorized USB eUICC reader detected, can proceed with external card diagnostics.
USB eUICC reader detected, please authorize first.
Available OMAPI secure element detected, can proceed with external/removable eUICC diagnostics.
No-root mode ready, please insert external eUICC or USB reader.
No external channel detected; internal eSIM only retains Android system fallback entry.
Check complete. Paysage standard version does not require root, recommend using external eUICC or USB reader.
Paysage standard version does not require root, will prioritize checking USB CCID, OMAPI, and removable eSIM environment; system eSIM only as fallback entry.
After inserting external eUICC or USB reader, click refresh at top right.
After inserting external eUICC or USB reader, click refresh at top right, profiles will appear here.
Complete system USB authorization first, then read external eUICC.
Profiles will appear here after external card returns manageable profiles; system fallback info in details.
USB Host supported, waiting for external reader insertion
OMAPI UICC supported, waiting for card ready
Standard version does not require root, please use external eUICC or USB reader
System currently does not expose manageable internal eSIM profiles to Paysage. For external eUICC, confirm reader and ISD-R status through diagnostic channel.
Authorize to show current active subscription summary.
System currently does not disclose active subscriptions.
Click confirm delete again to submit to system eSIM service.
Enable in settings to show OMAPI diagnostics.
Recognized and split the LPA code. The carrier requires a confirmation code.
Recognized and split the LPA code. Review it before continuing.
Could not split the input automatically. Fill in the carrier information manually.
Split the full LPA code. The carrier requires a confirmation code.
Common IMEI is 15 digits; IMEISV may be 16 digits.
This LPA marker requires the carrier confirmation code.
Enter the SM-DP+ Server to show preflight results.
System eSIM download service is unavailable.
No eSIM LPA activation code was found in the QR content.
Recognized the eSIM LPA activation code. Review it before continuing.
The QR content is not a complete eSIM LPA activation code.
Split the full LPA activation code.
Detected a full LPA code. Paste it at the beginning of the SM-DP+ or Matching ID field.
Generated a standard LPA activation code.
SM-DP+ address should be a full domain, such as smdp.example.com.
Domain length must be between 1 and 255 characters.
Each domain label cannot exceed 64 characters.
Domain labels cannot start or end with a hyphen.
Domain can only contain letters, digits, dots, hyphens, and an optional port.
Local preflight found issues that need fixing.
Local preflight can continue, but review the notices.
Local preflight passed. You can request system download.
A standard LPA activation code should start with a version number, for example 1$SM-DP+.
Current version is %s. Confirm the carrier explicitly requires this format.
Carrier SM-DP+ address is missing, so the system cannot locate the download server.
Remove spaces or line breaks from the address before downloading.
Some carriers allow it to be empty. If download fails, check whether Activation Code is missing.
Remove spaces or line breaks from the Matching ID.
OID retained, carrier marks confirmation code as required.
Carrier marks confirmation code as required.
This LPA activation code states that the carrier requires a Confirmation Code. Enter the code provided by the carrier.
Only required when the carrier asks for a confirmation code.
Confirmation code is character-sensitive. Remove spaces or line breaks.
The carrier-required confirmation code will be submitted separately with this download request.
The confirmation code will be submitted separately with this download request.
Confirmation code is ready to submit.
IMEI not entered. You can continue.
Common IMEI is 15 digits and IMEISV may be 16 digits. Check the carrier requirement.
IMEI will be retained for the external eUICC download path.
Detected %d extra parameters. The system will process them as-is.
No eSIM QR code was recognized in the image.
Scan the carrier QR code, or recognize it from an image.
Place the QR code inside the frame
You can select the QR image provided by the carrier to continue adding the external eSIM.
Without camera permission, QR scanning is unavailable. You can still select a QR image.
Allow camera access to scan the carrier eSIM QR code, or recognize it from an image.
The system did not return a confirmable eSIM operation.
The system confirmation flow can only be opened once. Start the download again.
The system returned invalid eSIM confirmation data.
The current system denied Paysage from opening the eSIM confirmation flow.
No eSIM download request has been started yet.
Submitted the eSIM operation request to the system, waiting for callback.
The system eSIM operation has completed.
The system needs user confirmation. Paysage is opening the system confirmation flow.
The current system has no eSIM management service.
The activation code is incomplete, so the download cannot start.
The system eSIM service is not enabled.
Submitted to the system eSIM service. User confirmation may be required.
This device does not support the Android eSIM download interface.
The system denied Paysage from starting eSIM download. Use the system eSIM management page.
The activation code was not accepted by the system eSIM download interface.
This device does not support this Android eSIM operation.
The system denied Paysage from performing this eSIM operation. Use the system eSIM management page.
The system did not accept this eSIM operation request.
The new name cannot be empty.
The system did not return more detailed diagnostic fields.
Scan the carrier QR code again, or check the SM-DP+ address and Matching ID in the LPA activation code.
Enter the carrier confirmation code again, paying attention to letter case and spaces.
Confirm that the device, carrier, and plan match. Contact the carrier to remove restrictions if needed.
Delete unused profiles in the system eSIM management page, then try again.
Wait for the current eSIM operation to finish, then try again.
Switch to a stable network and retry. If it fails repeatedly, try again later.
Refresh the eUICC summary and confirm the target port is available before switching or downloading.
Confirm that the device supports eSIM and that the system eSIM service is enabled.
This is usually a carrier server or certificate-chain issue. Contact the carrier.
The current profile policy does not allow this operation. Use the carrier or Android system fallback flow.
Open the system eSIM management page and retry, and keep the result codes for carrier or device vendor troubleshooting.
Shows system results for eSIM download, switch, delete, and rename operations.
Keeping SMS listening, offline retry, and health checks active.
Keeps SMS listening and offline retry stable.
Used for user-enabled IMAP IDLE real-time mail command monitoring.
Real-time monitoring connection was lost and will retry later.
Shows mail command check failures, login failures, and rejected command alerts.
Shows SMS forwarding failures, offline cache, and automatic retry results.
SMS was blocked by filter rules.
Network unavailable. SMS was added to offline cache.
System temporarily blocked foreground service startup. SMS was added to offline cache.
All forwarding channels failed and are waiting for automatic retry.
Enable it before checking command emails on a schedule.
Fill in IMAP server, port, mailbox account, and app password.
Check the mailbox account and app password, and confirm IMAP is enabled in the mailbox settings.
Check network, IMAP address, port, and provider connection limits.
System battery optimization or vendor background policies may delay WorkManager mail checks.
Usually caused by wrong secret, expired command, duplicate nonce, or this mailbox not being allowed to perform the action.
Mailbox login failed. Check username and app password.
Cannot connect to mailbox server. Check IMAP address, port, and network.
Checked %1$d mails, found %2$d new mails, executed %3$d commands, ignored %4$d mails.
Trusted sender email format is invalid.
Command secret must be at least %d characters.
Status recorded: SMS forwarding paused, offline cache has %d items.
Status recorded: SMS forwarding running, offline cache has %d items.
SMS forwarding resumed and cache retry scheduled.
One email can contain only one Paysage command.
Command field contains invisible control characters.
Sender is not in the whitelist.
Trusted mailbox is missing command secret. Rotate the secret.
This mailbox is not allowed to execute this command.
Command can use either secret or signature, not both.
Command nonce has already been used.
Command is missing secret or signature.
Command secret or signature is incorrect.
Real-time monitoring failed to start, low-frequency check will still run.
Applies immediately without leaving this page
